rulings.Case Title: GREENMD, LLC ET AL VS. NGUEY LAY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff'S And Cross Defendant Greenmd, Llc, Green Growth, Llc, Alchemical Earth Designs, Inc., St. Claire Capital Management, Inc., Jigar Patel'S Demurrer To Cross Complaint'S Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 16, 2018, line 1 Plaintiff'S And Cross Defendant Greenmd, Llc, Green Growth, Llc, Alchemical Earth Designs, Inc., St. Claire Capital Management, Inc., Jigar Patel'S Demurrer To Cross Complaint'S Cross-Complaint SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer to the first and second causes of action is overruled. Standing is sufficiently alleged. Demurrer to causes of action 3, 4, 6 and 8 is sustained with leave to amend to allege injury that is not incidental to injury to LLC and/or to allege demand/futility of demand. Additionally demurrer to the sixth cause of action is alleged to allege with requisite specificity reliance on misrepresentations and damages. Demurer to the seventh cause of action is sustained with leave to allege this cause of action with requisite specificity. = REQ

rulings.Case Title: COURTHOUSE VENTURES INC VS. EDWARD NOVAK ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Reconsideration To Set Aside Default
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 16, 2018, line 2 DEFENDANT EDWARD NOVAK'S Motion For Reconsideration of Order Denying Motion to Set Aside Default and Default Judgement is transferred to Department 505 to be heard by Judge Charles F. Haines at 9:00 a.m. on October 16, 2018. Judge Haines issues the following tentative ruling: Motion for Reconsideration is DENIED. Moving party failed to meet the requirements for reconsideration. The Court also note that Defendant executed a proof of service for this motion declaring under penalty of perjury that he is not a party to the action. = CFH
